changelog.message: feat: show update changelog in install, compare tag/dates

fix: CJK-aware menu padding, remove manifest self-update

ci: implement conventional-commits-driven auto versioning

chore: auto-update manifest.json [skip ci]

fix: update uninstall and tests to match renamed UI functions
ci: add GitHub Actions workflow to auto-update manifest.json
feat: enhance terminal UI with box-drawing, spinners, and cleaner steps
feat: add install.py self-update capability
fix: remove double v prefix in install menu version display
chore: bump manifest.json to v2.8.0
docs: update INSTALL.md and README.md for enhanced installer
simplify: fix menu numbering bug, remove dead code
feat: add interactive visual menu to install.py
simplify: remove dead imports, add EOFError guard, consolidate sys.path
feat: add install --uninstall, --clean, --incremental modes

fix: Batch 3 — remaining P3 + design issues
fix: Batch 2 — P2 bugs in preflight, upload log, genre routing
fix: Batch 1 — P0/P1 bugs in review pipeline, publisher CLI

refactor: move md/txt to formats/, replace txt regex with mistune renderer

@ feat: add HTML single-file export with inline CSS and TOC
chore: remove dead imports from chapter_collector.py and __init__.py

feat: add styles.py — CSS typesetting templates for web novel export
fix: replace fragile regex in heading() with direct string construction
feat: add parser.py — unified MD->HTML/AST via mistune v3
docs: export pipeline implementation plan — 9 tasks, 39 tests

fix: prevent PROJECT_ROOT drift from creating .webnovel in wrong directory
docs: multi-platform adapter framework, qimao pending browser verification

fix: 7 publisher bugs — null safety, error msg, tag match, browser close, batch resilience, bold html, log race
